title: Tasks automatically get assigned to myself
excerpt: I have one board for each team member, when I assign a task to them it automatically assigns it to myself. I want to be able to choose who to assign it to or to automatically assign it to the member the board is related …

posts.author: melvinsoto (Melvin Soto-Vázquez)
posts.cookedHtml: I have one board for each team member, when I assign a task to them it automatically assigns it to myself. I want to be able to choose who to assign it to or to automatically assign it to the member the board is related to

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @melvinsoto

Welcome to the Community!

Could you check if you have any automations set up on the board?
You can check this by selecting the robot icon in the top right hand corner of the board:

image1076×184 26.1 KB

It sounds like you might have an automation set up to assign yourself as the owner of the task!
Could you check this, and if this isn’t the issue, can you let us know if this is happening on multiple boards, or just one board?

Look forward to hearing back from you!

Best,

Dani
